content.speakerText: You're boarding from Gate B12, flight 234 to Tokyo.
content.speakerTextCn: 您从B12登机口登机，航班234飞东京。

options.text: I'll check in at Gate B12.
Can I change my gate to B12?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks! B12, got it.' 是对登机口信息的自然确认回应，符合复述关键信息的场景要求。干扰项1 'I'll check in at Gate B12.' 错误地将登机口与值机柜台混淆；干扰项2 'Can I change my gate to B12?' 暗示用户想更改登机口，但对话中是告知而非请求；干扰项3 'Is B12 the baggage claim?' 完全误解了登机口的功能。

content.speakerText: Your flight to Seoul is departing from Gate C7. Please have your boarding pass ready.
content.speakerTextCn: 您飞往首尔的航班从C7登机口起飞，请准备好登机牌。

options.text: I need to go to the restroom first.
Can I board from Gate C8 instead?
How much is the fare to Seoul?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'C7? Got it, thanks!' 是对登机口信息的标准确认回应，语气自然且包含复述与感谢。干扰项1与场景无关，是个人需求；干扰项2试图更改登机口，不符合告知语境；干扰项3混淆了登机口与机票价格，属于完全无关的提问。

content.speakerText: Flight AA101 to London is now boarding at Gate D3.
content.speakerTextCn: 飞往伦敦的AA101航班现在从D3登机口开始登机。

options.text: Is D3 the correct gate for AA101?
I'd like to book a seat on that flight.
When does the flight arrive in London?
Can I get a snack at Gate D3?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Is D3 the correct gate for AA101?' 是对关键信息的合理确认，符合场景中‘复述确认’的要求。干扰项1是预订行为，发生在登机前阶段；干扰项2询问到达时间，与当前确认登机口无关；干扰项3询问零食，属于无关细节。

content.template: You're boarding from Gate ___ , flight 234 to Tokyo.
content.hint: 登机口通常由字母加数字组成，如A5、B12等。
content.knowledgePoint: 登机口标准格式（字母+数字）

content.template: Could you please confirm the ___ for my flight to Paris?
content.hint: 在机场询问登机位置时，最常用的词是这个。

content.template: I'm at Gate C5 — is this ___ for flight AA205?
content.hint: 用于确认信息是否准确的常用形容词。
content.knowledgePoint: 确认信息的固定搭配（is this correct?）

content.speakerText: You're boarding from Gate B12, flight 234 to Tokyo.
content.speakerTextCn: 您从B12登机口登机，航班234飞东京。
expectedAnswers: Is that the right gate? Just want to double-check.
Got it — Gate B12 for flight 234 to Tokyo, thanks!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确确认了登机口和航班信息
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合机场口语习惯，语气礼貌自然
关键词覆盖：是否包含 gate、flight、destination 等关键词

content.speakerText: Your flight to Seoul is departing from Gate C7.
content.speakerTextCn: 您飞往首尔的航班从C7登机口起飞。
expectedAnswers: Is C7 the correct gate? I just want to make sure.
Thanks! I'll head to C7 right away.
C7 for Seoul — perfect, I'm on my way!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰确认或复述登机口信息
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词和介词结构
表达自然度：符合机场工作人员与旅客间的日常对话节奏
关键词覆盖：是否包含 gate、flight、destination 或相关动词如 depart

content.speakerText: Flight AA101 to London is now boarding at Gate D3.
content.speakerTextCn: 飞往伦敦的AA101航班现在从D3登机口开始登机。
expectedAnswers: Is D3 the gate for AA101? Just confirming.
Thanks! I'm heading to D3 now.
So I board at D3 for London? Perfect!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应并确认登机口和航班号
语言准确性：句子结构完整，无严重语法错误
表达自然度：语气自然，符合口语习惯，有适当停顿和语调
关键词覆盖：是否包含 gate、flight、board、destination 等场景关键词
